title: Running local models is good now
author: jfb
aiHeadline: Running local models is finally good, after years of being slow, buggy, and making your computer cry. Progress, right?

title: SpaceX to buy Cursor for $60B
author: itsmarcelg
aiHeadline: SpaceX to buy Cursor for $60B, because apparently, Elon Musk's midlife crisis just got a whole lot more expensive. What's next? A $100B paperweight?

title: I admire Fabrice Bellard. He is almost certainly a better overall programmer
author: apitman
aiHeadline: I admire Fabrice Bellard. He is almost certainly a better overall programmer than you, so maybe you should just give up and become a barista. Or a cat.

title: Mechanical Watch (2022)
author: razin
aiHeadline: Mechanical Watch (2022): Because nothing says 'I'm a Luddite' like a watch that doesn't even have a smart feature. But hey, at least it won't distract you with TikTok!

title: Apple's weird anti-nausea dots cured my car sickness
author: neilfrndes
aiHeadline: Apple's weird anti-nausea dots cured my car sickness, proving once again that even the most ridiculous tech can actually work. Now, can they fix my existential dread?
